prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Realistic only. No template. Documentary, cinematic. Drone/aerial view of Amazon rainforest with energy infrastructure.
prompt.subject: Drone aerial view of Amazonian rainforest. Dense canopy stretches to the horizon. A wide river cuts through the frame; the same water that feeds hydroelectric dams. Or: high-voltage transmission towers and power lines cutting through the canopy, carrying energy from Amazon hydro. Or: a reservoir or dam visible in the distance, forest meeting water. The connection: this landscape powers the grid.
prompt.camera: Drone POV, high altitude, looking down at 30–45 degrees. 24mm equivalent. Deep depth of field. River or power corridor creates strong leading lines. Vast scale: canopy as a textured carpet.
prompt.scene: Primary forest, river visible. Transmission lines or dam structure in frame (subtle, not dominant). Mist over the canopy. No people. Real infrastructure: towers, cables, or concrete, grounded in the landscape.
prompt.lighting: Golden hour or soft overcast. Sun low, long shadows across the canopy. Volumetric light through mist. One crisp lens flare if sun at edge of frame.

prompt.prompt: Shot from outside through a glass door looking into a small startup office late at night. Two dark silhouettes of men stand at a whiteboard covered in scribbled diagrams. The glass reflects faint streetlight. Inside the room a single warm lamp lights the whiteboard and casts long shadows across a messy desk with coffee cups and papers. The men are seen from behind through the glass, just shapes and posture, no visible faces. Outside is dark and quiet. Shot on Cinestill 800T, 35mm film, heavy tungsten halation around the lamp through the glass, deep grain, shallow focus on the glass surface so the figures are slightly soft. The feeling of glimpsing something private and obsessive. Street photography aesthetic, not staged.
prompt.negative: daylight, bright, sunny, faces visible, looking at camera, close-up portrait, CGI, 3D render, illustration, cartoon, stock photo, posed, smiling, neon, corporate office, suits, clean, pristine, HDR, oversaturated, sharp digital look, more than two people

lithium_mine_open_pit.placement: 3:4 template (template-3x4.html), full background for capital-follows-energy quote RT

prompt.prompt: Open-pit hard-rock lithium mine in harsh daylight. Concentric terraced walls cut into pale gray and tan rock, subtle whitish-green mineral streaks on the faces. A haul road switchbacks down the bowl. Two or three yellow mining trucks crawl along a bench, tiny against the geometry — scale is the story. Dust hangs in the still air. Dry high-desert sky, thin clouds, brutal sun from upper left. Foreground: loose gravel and tire tracks on the rim road. Shot from an elevated vantage on the pit edge, not directly overhead. Large-format documentary look: 4x5 field camera, 150mm lens, f/22, Kodak Portra 160. Infinite depth of field, every terrace line sharp. Muted earth palette, slightly desaturated except the yellow trucks. Fine grain. Feels like Edward Burtynsky or a National Geographic industrial feature — capital and geology laid bare, no romance, no people visible as figures.
prompt.negative: CGI, 3D render, illustration, cartoon, lush green jungle, tropical, underwater, brine evaporation ponds as main subject, neon, oversaturated, fake gem sparkle, text, logos, explosion, disaster, apocalyptic, fisheye, sci-fi, workers in close-up, idyllic nature

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Realistic only. No template. Motion-picture still: American garage, widescreen 16:9, shot-on-film look with heavy photochemical texture—not a clean digital frame.
prompt.subject: An elderly American man sits on a worn wooden stool or low chair in his cluttered home garage. He lifts rounded wire-rim reading glasses onto his nose with one hand and studies a single sheet of paper he holds in the other—bills, a letter, or a diagram, paper slightly curled, no readable text. Weathered face, quiet concentration. Workbench, hand tools on pegboard, paint cans, extension cords, American everyday detail. Feels like a real person’s space, not a showroom. Widescreen frame: use the full garage width—pegboard wall, bench, and deep background (car under cover, shelves, water heater) so the environment reads as a real rectangle, not a tight portrait crop.
prompt.camera: Eye level to slightly below eye level, 35mm cinema spherical (or mild 40mm anamorphic squeeze) for 16:9—enough field of view to hold subject in left or right third with garage depth and tools in the opposite third. Shallow-to-medium depth of field: critical focus on eyes behind glasses and paper edge; midground bench sharp; far corner and bokeh fall off into soft hexagonal highlights from the practicals.
prompt.scene: Closed garage interior spanning the full frame: concrete floor with oil stains, dust in the air, maybe a car silhouette or tarp in the far third. Night or late evening outside; only practical lights inside. Horizontal composition feels like a graded 35mm film frame, not a vertical poster.
prompt.lighting: Low-key: one warm tungsten work lamp over the bench or a bare bulb overhead, hard falloff, deep shadows in rafters and corners. Thin rim of cooler ambient from a small window or cracked garage door—barely there. No bright fill. Highlights clip slightly like photochemical stock under practicals.

cinematography.color: cinematic American indie drama grade: warm amber key, cool shadow pockets, slightly desaturated skin, natural contrast, film print density (not HDR, not video)
cinematography.film_grain: prominent motion-picture 35mm photochemical grain throughout—visible in shadows and midtones, organic clumping, not digital noise; same family as hero/solar prompts
cinematography.lens_effects: tungsten halation bloom around bare bulb and lamp; crisp hexagonal bokeh on out-of-focus metal and highlights; optional subtle anamorphic streak if sun or spec catches lens—never cartoon flare
cinematography.sharpness: 8K crisp, tack-sharp focus, ultra detail, pristine clarity, razor-sharp edges on eyes, glasses, paper, and tool silhouettes; micro-contrast on skin texture and metal—sharp subject read inside a grainy film envelope
cinematography.mood: intimate, patient, working-class American, quiet drama, theatrical release still, not sentimental

prompt.negative: bright daylight, high key, studio lighting, HDR, clean digital, noise reduction, plastic skin, overly smooth, iPhone look, smiling at camera, posed stock photo, CGI, cartoon, European cottage, pristine garage, sports car hero shot, neon, readable text on paper, extra people, horror, apocalyptic, video game, 3D render

mica_merch_box.placement: Merch / drop marketing, social (phone-realistic lifestyle still)
mica_merch_box.reference_logo: Attach the official **mica logo image** (PNG/SVG) as the locked geometry reference. **Backpack front flap** and **cap front panel** show **only** that supplied geometric mark in **brand red** (#FF0032), exact shape and proportions. **T-shirt chest**, **pen barrel**, and **USB body** show the word **mica** as **typeset lowercase** thin neo-grotesque sans: **#FF0032** on the white tee, **white** on the black pen, **white** on the black USB. **Never** put the geometric mark on the tee, pen, USB. **Never** typeset the word **mica** on the cap and backpack. **Never** invent a different icon.

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. Follow **reference_logo** without deviation. **Premium design-led hardware brand tier**: expensive materials, precise registration, gift-grade packaging. **Photoreal iPhone snapshot**: ChatGPT-style unboxing, casual handheld angle, kitchen counter, natural daylight. Optical imperfections belong to the **phone lens only**; **merch stays flawless**. Not a studio catalog. Not a flat overhead packshot.
prompt.subject: **Exactly one** matte black rigid merch box. **Thick board** with **soft-touch laminate**. Inner lid face shows **mica** in thin lowercase **white** sans. **Black precision-cut foam** insert, snug gift fit, sharp corners on the board. **Five items inside only**, nothing on the counter: **(1) Backpack** — **white 1680-denier ballistic nylon**, **metal coil zippers**, **red hairline dashed lines** and **black hairline dashed lines** in a technical grid on panels, **red user-supplied geometric logo** centered on the front flap. **(2) T-shirt** — **white 260 gsm cotton**, folded flat, chest has **mica** in thin lowercase **#FF0032** screen print, tight registration. **(3) Cap** — **white structured six-panel twill**, **red dense embroidery** of **user-supplied geometric logo** on the front panel. **(4) Pen** — **matte black anodized aluminum barrel**, **chrome clip**, **mica** in thin lowercase **white** pad print beside the clip. **(5) USB drive** — **black anodized aluminum housing**, **mica** in thin lowercase **white** laser etch on the top face. **No sixth object.**
prompt.camera: **iPhone main camera**. **50-degree downward angle** into the open box from slightly in front. **Single** lid leans back in the upper frame. **Mild barrel distortion**: near edge of box reads slightly wider than far edge. **Autofocus** peaks on backpack and cap. Edge compartments fractionally softer. **Slight handheld decentering**. **Light corner vignette**.
prompt.scene: **White quartz kitchen island countertop**. **Single** open merch box centered in frame. **Background** falls to soft bokeh: **dark stainless range**, **white Shaker cabinets**, narrow slice of **daylit window**. **Counter visible** as a clean rim around the box. **No people. No hands. No clutter.**
prompt.lighting: **Natural daylight** enters **from camera left**. **Soft cool key**, gentle fill from the bright kitchen. **Shadows** inside foam cavities and under the propped lid. **No studio strobes. No ring light.** **Specular hits** on pen clip and USB metal plug from **window light**. **Phone HDR**: lifted shadows, **highlights intact**.

cinematography.color: iPhone color science: slightly warm overall, lifted shadows, clean whites on cap and t-shirt, true blacks on box
cinematography.film_grain: very fine digital sensor noise in shadow areas inside the box—phone sensor, not film
cinematography.lens_effects: mild barrel distortion; subtle **chromatic aberration** on high-contrast box edges; natural window reflection on shiny surfaces; **no** anamorphic flare, **no** dramatic bokeh balls
cinematography.sharpness: phone computational sharpening: sharp on focused compartments, slight softness on lid text and far edge—**not** clinical macro
cinematography.mood: just-opened-it energy—**top-tier tech brand kit** perceived value; casual phone capture; **objects read expensive** and **design-controlled**

prompt.negative: items outside the box, merch scattered on table, more than 5 items, second box, two boxes, duplicate package, nested outer shipping box visible as second container, hoodie, watch box, booklet, whitepaper, basketball, socks, keychain, porte-clé, word mica on cap, word mica on backpack, geometric logo on t-shirt, geometric logo on pen, geometric logo on USB, cheap swag, thin see-through t-shirt, flimsy box, crushed foam, bent cardboard, plastic USB toy, plastic promo pen, screen print bleed, crooked logo, loose embroidery threads, AliExpress quality, trade show giveaway, dollar-store, wrinkled junk, garish colors, perfectly overhead flat lay, pro studio, seamless paper, softbox, ring light catchlights, tripod, perfect symmetry, tilt-shift, CGI, 3D render, floating objects, wrong logo geometry, invented mark, simplified fake logo, black-only cap, all-black backpack, backpack without dashed-line grid, neon, hands, faces, dirty kitchen, heavy filters, stock mockup, DSLR bokeh

banker_cheque_handoff.placement: Optional. 16:9 — funding close, institutional handoff; motion-picture still, not stock.

prompt.instruction: Generate a single standalone image. No template. **High-cinema kinetic frame** — not a static catalog shot. **Dense, realistic** motion-picture grab: **lived-in** office, real materials, but the image must feel like **one pulled frame from a moving shot** — **energy, velocity, glass and flares, selective motion blur**. Reference *The Wolf of Wall Street* **hand-forward thrust**; **do not** copy actors or identifiable stills. Original banker, original space.
prompt.subject: A white male investment banker in his 40s, immaculate tailored dark suit, **French cuffs, quality watch, wedding band optional**, subtle pocket square or lapel pin — **physically plausible**. **High-back leather chair** may edge frame. **The recipient is not in the picture**: **never** another person, hands, silhouette, or client reflection. **Kinetic gesture**: he **thrusts** a ceremonial **bank cheque toward the camera** (WoWS energy) — arm **unlocked**, paper **deep in foreground**. **The cheque must not read as a typography hero**: **no sharp printed numbers or words** — treat it like **real cinematography** where the slip is **blurred** by **motion**, **shallow depth of field**, or both: only a **soft oblong of paper**, **cream stock**, **faint horizontal lines**, maybe a **smear of ink** — **suggest** a document, **never** a legible **$300K** or spelled-out amount sticking out. Face / eyes / suit in the **midground** carry the story, not the line items. **Busy realistic desk** (see scene).
prompt.camera: **Camera in front of the banker**, slightly **below eye level**, **35mm or 40mm anamorphic**. **Handheld or Steadicam micro-drift** — **subtle push-in** or **lateral sway**. **Medium shot** with **desk + window + shelving** in play. **Focus plane behind the nearest plane of the cheque** — e.g. **eyes and face** or **upper chest / desk plane** tack-sharp; the **cheque and nearest hand** fall into **foreground bokeh** and/or **motion streak** so the slip feels **fast and real**, not a **product shot**. **Rear third** may **smear** with motion. **Anamorphic geometry** on streaks and bokeh. No fisheye.
prompt.scene: **Corner office / private banking suite**, **visually rich** and **documentary-credible**: **dark walnut or mahogany desk** with **tooled leather blotter**, **brass or glass desk lamp** (off or dim practical), **heavy crystal tumbler** with **condensation ring** on coaster, **fountain pen** beside a **closed folio** or **manila deal folder** (tabs visible, **no readable confidential text**), **reading glasses** folded on papers, **silver pen tray**, **small brass analogue clock** or **desk calendar block**, **stack of bond paper** with **slight curl**, **leather-bound volume** spine out of focus, **landline phone handset** or **charging cable** snaking to edge. **Behind him**: **tall sash windows**, **city haze** and **distant buildings**, **sheer curtain** half-drawn; **one wall** with **framed diplomas or art** (titles **illegible**); **low bookshelf** with **legal tomes and reports**; **baseboard, crown molding, rug edge** at bottom. **Low-key** fill from practicals; **no second visitor chair** in frame — **client side** implied by **empty chair back** **barely** in deep bokeh **or** cropped out entirely. Everything **dust-specked, finger-smudged, worn** where appropriate — **not a showroom**.
prompt.lighting: Strong **rim / key from window** positioned to **feed the lens** — sun or hard sky break at **glass edge** so **flare is motivated**, not random. Plus **desk practical** skimming **crystal, metal, blotter**. **Low colorimetry on surfaces** (muted wood, desaturated suit) **but flare may bloom warm or cool-anamorphic** across a portion of frame — **photochemical veil**, not RGB gamer glow. **Deep shadow** on far cheek; **specular paths** that **streak** when flared.

cinematography.color: **Restrained grade** on sets and skin — **compressed chroma**, steel/charcoal/off-white base — **punctuated** by **flare and highlight bloom** (same family as hero / X-banner stills). **Print-like blacks** in unflared areas; **not flat HDR video**
cinematography.film_grain: **Heavy 35mm photochemical grain** — visible in shadows and midtones, **organic clumping**; survives through **motion smear** and **flare veil**
cinematography.motion: **Directional motion blur** — **~1/30s–1/60s shutter** feel: the **cheque and the leading hand** carry **strong blur** (paper **streaks** or **soft blob** toward lens); **readable typography on the slip is impossible** — **by design**. **Background** (windows, city, rear desk) may **smear**; **banker’s face** can stay **relatively sharp** if focus is held there. **Optical motion blur**, not a radial Photoshop smudge. **Single frozen instant** of **ongoing motion**
cinematography.lens_effects: **BOLD anamorphic lens flare** — **horizontal blue/cyan streak**, **veiling glare**, **hexagonal or oval bokeh** in depth; **secondary ghost** or **haze** from window line; **crisp sun-knuckle** where hard light hits glass — **same vocabulary as hero dam / solar prompts**; **never** clip-art star polygons
cinematography.sharpness: **Critical sharpness** on **subject** — **eyes, facial structure, suit fabric** where focus lands — **not** on the cheque. **Cheque**: **no micro-detail**, **no legible type** — only **soft paper mass**, **edge softness**, **motion smear**. **Cufflinks / tumbler** optional sharp **specular dots** if in the focal island; background **intentionally softer**
cinematography.mood: **Kinetic Wall Street power** — **liquidity in motion** — **anonymous counterparty**, **big-screen trailer energy**

prompt.negative: second person visible, client hands, recipient face, two-shot, OTS of client, **empty desk, void showroom**, **sharp legible cheque text, readable dollar amount, crisp printed figures or words on the slip, typography-poster cheque, infographic numbers on paper, mock-up clean document**, readable confidential deal text, legible bank branding as hero, watermarks, **static tripod lock-off, entire cheque tack-sharp, product-shot document**, plastic CGI blur, radial zoom smudge, **HDR sky replacement**, neon cyber, plastic skin, wax hands, extra fingers, cartoon, stock grin, fish-eye, dutch parody, iPhone night mode, flat fill, WeWork neon, crowded trading floor as subject, floating objects, duplicated props, impossible reflections

_style_reference.crisp: 8K crisp, tack-sharp focus, ultra detail, pristine clarity, razor-sharp edges
_style_reference.lens_flare: BOLD anamorphic lens flare, crisp hexagonal bokeh, same style as X banner images
_style_reference.rule: Realistic only. No abstract, no control rooms, no glowing screens, no fake structures, no CGI look. Documentary realism.
